items.title: ‘Beyond code errors’ – How Drift Protocol’s $285mln drain shifts DeFi security bar
items.whyYouShouldCare: The $285 million loss at Drift Protocol raises concerns about DeFi security, potentially impacting investor confidence and liquidity across platforms, including Solana.

items.title: Crypto attorney says Drift incident may qualify as 'civil negligence'
items.whyYouShouldCare: If the Drift incident is deemed civil negligence, it could lead to stricter regulatory scrutiny in DeFi, affecting operational frameworks for projects on Solana.

items.title: Recap: Here’s how Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, and XRP ETFs performed this week
items.whyYouShouldCare: Performance of ETFs linked to Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, and XRP indicates market sentiment and could influence institutional interest and liquidity in Solana's ecosystem.
